Class CookingStationState

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.station.CookingStationState
public class CookingStationState extends Object
Mutable runtime state for a single cooking station (furnace or campfire block). Persisted to the block's PDC via CookingStationPdc on GUI close and state changes.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    INGREDIENT_COUNT
    Number of ingredient slots in a cooking station.
    static final int
    OUTPUT_COUNT
    Number of output slots in a cooking station.

  • Method Details

    • getIngredient

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getIngredient(int index)
      Returns the item in the given ingredient slot.
      Parameters:
      index - 0–4
      Returns:
      the item, or null if the slot is empty

    • setIngredient

      public void setIngredient(int index, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Sets the item in the given ingredient slot.
      Parameters:
      index - 0–4
      item - the item to place, or null to clear

    • ingredientSnapshot

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack[] ingredientSnapshot()
      Returns a snapshot copy of all ingredient slots.
      Returns:
      array of length INGREDIENT_COUNT

    • getOutput

      public @Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getOutput(int index)
      Returns the item in the given output slot.
      Parameters:
      index - 0–4
      Returns:
      the item, or null if the slot is empty

    • setOutput

      public void setOutput(int index, @Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Sets the item in the given output slot.
      Parameters:
      index - 0–4
      item - the item to place, or null to clear

      public void setCookProgress(int cookProgress)

      public @Nullable CookingRecipe getActiveRecipe()

      public void setActiveRecipe(@Nullable CookingRecipe activeRecipe)

    • getLastInteractor

      public @Nullable UUID getLastInteractor()
      Returns:
      the UUID of the player who last mutated an ingredient or fuel slot, or null

    • setLastInteractor

      public void setLastInteractor(UUID lastInteractor)
      Records the player who last mutated an ingredient or fuel slot.
      Parameters:
      lastInteractor - the interacting player's UUID

    • getEffectiveCookTime

      public int getEffectiveCookTime()
      Returns the effective cook time in ticks for the current recipe cycle. Zero means no cycle is active; use CookingRecipe.cookTime() as the base.
      Returns:
      effective cook time, or 0 if not yet set for the current cycle

    • setEffectiveCookTime

      public void setEffectiveCookTime(int effectiveCookTime)
      Sets the effective cook time for the current recipe cycle.
      Parameters:
      effectiveCookTime - the cook time in ticks, or 0 to reset for the next cycle

    • getLastQuality

      public @Nullable CookingQuality getLastQuality()
      Returns the quality tier of the most recently completed cook cycle, or null if none. Not persisted to PDC.

    • setLastQuality

      public void setLastQuality(@Nullable CookingQuality lastQuality)
      Parameters:
      lastQuality - the rolled quality, or null to clear

    • isForceNextPerfect

      public boolean isForceNextPerfect()
      Returns:
      true if the next quality cook is forced to Perfect

    • setForceNextPerfect

      public void setForceNextPerfect(boolean forceNextPerfect)
      Parameters:
      forceNextPerfect - true to force the next quality cook to Perfect

    • getViewers

      public Set<UUID> getViewers()

    • addViewer

      public void addViewer(UUID uuid)

    • removeViewer

      public void removeViewer(UUID uuid)

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns true if every ingredient slot, the fuel slot, and all output slots are empty.

    • cookProgressFraction

      public double cookProgressFraction()
      Returns the fraction of cook progress as a value between 0.0 and 1.0. Uses effectiveCookTime when set, falling back to the recipe's base cook time. Returns 0.0 if no recipe is active.
